reviews.text: Very professional and quick response to any issues that arrived highly recommended
Excellent service! Contacted about help with an event and the team were so professional, thouroughly discussed our options and did exactly what was needed. Fantastic!

Had the absolute pleasure of working alongside Andy and his team at inter the wild festival.  Absolute legend,  knowledgeable,  professional and a joy to work alongside.
Look forward to working with Emt anytime
Bob the wizard
💜🧙🧙‍♂️⚡️

Alan arrived in good time he was a likeable man.Luckily only 2 plasters  were needed during the event. EMT were our first choice for medical cover this year and we will certainly be booking them for future events.
